title: [v2.0.5-rhel] Cirrus: Only essential automated testing
body:
Fixes #8555

This disables all but the most essential CI tasks for the branch, due to frequent flakes in the F32 Remote client integration test.

Signed-off-by: Chris Evich <cevich@redhat.com>

comments.body: @cevich, weird error here, I think a flake.

@TomSweeneyRedHat I'm assuming you're talking about [the `add branch to title / update_pr (pull_request)` failure](https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/8628/checks?check_run_id=1511325779).  That's a Github-Actions worflow @vrothberg setup.  He's the best one to try and debug it.  Unf. fixes to it cannot happen in any PR, the workflow only ever takes effected _after_ it's merged into the master branch (Thanks Github!).  So it's probably something you can safely ignore.
There...manual PR title rename for clarity.
